# Scrapy Ecosystem — Vendored Context

Repos with 500+ stars, cloned `--depth 1` with `.git` stripped. Read-only context for the agentic crawler.

## Core Scrapy Tools

| Repo | Stars | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| scrapy/scrapy | 60,958 | Main framework — vendored at `../scrapy/` |
| scrapy-plugins/scrapy-playwright | 1,382 | Playwright integration for JS rendering |
| scrapy/scrapyd | 3,088 | Service daemon to run Scrapy spiders |
| scrapy-plugins/scrapy-splash | 3,233 | Splash JS rendering integration |
| rmax/scrapy-redis | 5,635 | Redis-based distributed components |

## Crawler Management Platforms

| Repo | Stars | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| crawlab-team/crawlab | 12,178 | Distributed crawler admin platform |
| Gerapy/Gerapy | 3,501 | Django+Vue management framework |
| my8100/scrapydweb | 3,408 | Scrapyd cluster management web app |
| DormyMo/SpiderKeeper | 2,776 | Admin UI for Scrapy/Scrapyd |
| Boris-code/feapder | 3,652 | Multi-spider framework (Air/Spider/Task/Batch) |

## Visual Scraping

| Repo | Stars | Description |
|------|-------|-------------|
| scrapinghub/portia | 9,495 | Visual scraping tool for Scrapy |
